credentials.title: Companion Credentials
credentials.description: Credentials from pyatv pairing. Use the Custom UI to pair your Apple TV.

identifier.title: Apple TV Identifier
identifier.description: Optional. Apple TV identifier (e.g. 3A9926A3-228C-4C30-AA5C-A8E85495EC68). When provided alongside Credentials, the daemon connects directly via Companion and skips mDNS discovery — required if Homebridge runs on a different VLAN/subnet than the Apple TV (mDNS multicast cannot cross VLAN boundaries). Find it in the output of `atvremote scan` (the long UUID-shaped Identifier).

companionPort.title: Companion Port
companionPort.description: Optional. Override the Companion-protocol TCP port if the default 49153 doesn't match your Apple TV. Only used together with Identifier (scan-skip fast path); the regular scan-based path discovers this automatically.

debounceDuration.title: Flap-guard Duration (seconds)
debounceDuration.description: Window after a state change during which flips are suppressed to filter transient flaps
